channel.title: Ming Trends
channel.description: English hot lists and trend intelligence for global traffic sources.

item.title: Global Trend Sources Guide
item.description: How Ming Trends adapts Google Trends, Reddit, YouTube, X, Hacker News, Product Hunt, GitHub, TikTok, Twitch, Steam, and more.

item.title: How Newsrooms Use AI Without Giving Up Editorial Control
item.description: Background analysis for AI, media automation, and editorial accountability topics.
